meaning: Lake 的的喀喀湖[南美洲西部](在秘鲁同玻利维亚之间)
examples: Peru is braced for further rain. Lake Titicaca is close to overflowing.
Ubinas is one of many volcanoes that dot the high desert plateau east of Lake Titicaca in southern Peru.
Flush with success, Inca Kings set their sights farther afield, on the wealthy lands surrounding Lake Titicaca.
Then head back to Arequipa to catch the bus to Puno, gateway to Lake Titicaca.
Guests have a private beach and dock at a private retreat on a private island in Lake Titicaca.
